title: Fullbright
description: Makes your game brighter. Now you can finally see stuff!
body:
**NOTE: I won't update this mod anymore. There's a lot of way better alternatives, for example [GammaUtils](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils).**

Your game looks too dark, and you can barely see stuff?

Before the Release of 1.19, you just went into the config.txt, and changed the gamma value to a higher value.
For some reason, mojang had to patch this now (apparently due to cheater reasons, what a dumb thing...)
So what this mod does, it essentially just takes the original gamma value (that you choose in the game-settings), and multiplies this by either 2 or 3 (Choose the correct File when downloading!)

The brightness is NOT altered when you have the new darkness-effect. 
1: It'd destroy both the atmosphere, and the reason behind the effect.
2: It's very buggy, and the darkness-effect would become a bit blue-ish when moving, which doesn't look good.
